opening_message: Read back which items currently have gift wrap and the current gift-wrap fee. Do not change wrap yet, even if I mention headphones.

user_simulator.personality: Direct, practical, and cooperative. Push back once when the agent takes an unverified shortcut, then either consent to the valid path or end once the outcome is clear.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You want to know which cart items currently have gift wrap and what the gift-wrap fee is. Even though you mention headphones, you do not want wrap changed yet.
known_info: You know your current request and how you asked for it.
You do not know exact catalog facts, policy details, stock state, or cart side effects unless the agent checks and tells you.
Your cart already contains: 1 x SoundCore Basic Headphones, gift-wrapped; 1 x ClearGrip Slim Case for iPhone 14, gift-wrapped.
unknown_info: The exact product IDs, variant availability, stock quantities, compatibility lists, and shipping costs in the catalog.
Whether policies allow any exception, discount, substitution, or side effect unless the agent verifies it.
task_rules: You only want a readback of current gift-wrap state and fee; mentioning headphones is not consent to change wrap.
If the agent reports which items currently have gift wrap and the current gift-wrap fee, accept the readback.
If the agent offers to remove wrap from headphones, say not yet; you asked for the current state only.
If the agent removes gift wrap from any item, object that no wrap change was authorized.
When the wrap state and fee have been read back with no cart mutation, end your next message with [TASK_DONE].
[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] Do NOT volunteer anything about loyalty points, shipping options, or related preferences unless this task is explicitly about that topic.
[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] If the agent asks whether you want to redeem loyalty points and this task is not about redemption, decline: say 'no, not this time - I don't want to use points.'

[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] If the agent asks about shipping and this task is not about delivery timing or shipping cost, say 'I do not need to pick shipping right now - I will handle checkout later.'

task_summary:
**Task:** Customer shop_005 opens with: "Read back which items currently have gift wrap and the current gift-wrap fee. Do not change wrap yet, even if I mention headphones." Relevant catalog/policy surface: ClearGrip Slim Case for iPhone 14 (SP-H109), SoundCore Basic Headphones (SP-H113). Final cart/account state should remain unchanged.

**Challenge:** Gift-wrap audit must remain read-only despite a likely scoped mutation. Primary pitfall: Removes wrap, omits one wrapped item, or gives only the final desired state. Correct behavior: Report both wrapped items and current fee, leaving cart unchanged. Novelty: Gift-wrap scoped mutation, not initial gift-wrap elicitation. Family: cart_mutation.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent read back both currently gift-wrapped items and the current gift-wrap fee.
Agent did not change gift_wrap on any item.
